steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage moves from a general claim (sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic) to a specific case (the A320 jet). The transition word must indicate that the A320 is an example of this general principle.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: ”For example” directly marks the A320 as a concrete instance of the general principle just stated. The other choices suggest adding a point, describing simultaneous events, or signaling contrast—none capture the exemplary relationship needed here. That matches choice A — A is correct.
